Language is plain and direct with no jargon. Brevity loses a half-point for a slightly generic opening sentence and a couple of lines that state the obvious ('You are representing your child and your community'), but overall the piece earns its length. Voice is warm and reader-aware—lines like 'Board members are busy and often tired' and 'remain the calmest person in the room' show genuine understanding—though it could use a touch more personality to reach a 5 on humanity. One of the stronger practical guides I've seen for this prompt."}

rationale: Exceptionally clear and well-organized guide that follows a logical chronological arc from research through follow-up. Concrete details throughout (e.g., '24 hours in advance,' 'two and a half minutes,' 'vote no on a budget item,' the buzzer/red light detail) elevate it well beyond vague advice. Language is plain and direct with no jargon. Brevity loses a half-point for a slightly generic opening sentence and a couple of lines that state the obvious ('You are representing your child and your community'), but overall the piece earns its length. Voice is warm and reader-aware—lines like 'Board members are busy and often tired' and 'remain the calmest person in the room' show genuine understanding—though it could use a touch more personality to reach a 5 on humanity. One of the stronger practical guides I've seen for this prompt.
